---
description: 'UI coding conventions for the project.'
---



- if implementing a web app, use vite as the build tool. Always fetch the latest documentation from https://vitejs.dev/ . 
- if implementing a web app, use Vue as the frontend library. Always fetch the latest documentation from https://vuejs.org/

- when implementing a web app ui, always make sure to implement dark/light theme switching, and to use a modern and appealing design. You can use a CSS framework like Tailwind CSS to help with styling and responsiveness. Always fetch the latest documentation from https://tailwindcss.com/ to ensure you are using the best practices for styling your app. 


- Mobile device support: When implementing a web app ui, the app should be  be designed to be responsive and functional on mobile devices, ensuring that users can access their financial dashboard and reports on the go. The layout will adapt to different screen sizes, providing an optimal user experience across various devices.
